Our Services

Everything Your Body
Deserves

From therapeutic massage to chiropractic care — a complete wellness experience curated for your restoration.

Massage & Bodywork

From $110 60–90 min

Deep-tissue and neuro-muscular therapy. Our Signature Integrative Massage combines healing, restoring and rehabilitating techniques designed to help you relax and enjoy true wellness benefits.

  • Signature Integrative Massage
  • Pregnancy Massage — $110
  • Kinesio Taping — $8/area
  • Assisted Stretching — $10
Book This Service →

Facials

$80 – $180 60–90 min

From our luxurious 90-minute Ultimate Facial with microderm exfoliation and light therapy to the relaxing Escape Facial — every treatment is tailored to reveal your best skin.

  • Kara Ultimate Facial — $180
  • Kara Escape Facial — $80
  • Microderm Exfoliation
  • Light Therapy & High-Frequency
Book This Service →

Body Treatments

See packages Varies

Specialty body wraps and treatments designed to detoxify, hydrate and rejuvenate. Each session envelops you in healing warmth while nourishing your skin from head to toe.

  • Body Wraps
  • Detoxifying Treatments
  • Full-Body Hydration
  • Specialty Techniques
Book This Service →

Pedicure Services

From $90 60+ min

Beginning with a soothing foot soak, our pedicures include warm stone massage on feet and calves, thorough exfoliation, and meticulous nail care — finished with warm towels.

  • Kara Ultimate Pedicure — $90
  • Hot Stone Pedicure
  • Warm Stone Calf Massage
  • Nail Conditioning & Polish
Book This Service →

Hair Removal

Varies 15–45 min

Professional waxing services and lash & brow tinting for a polished, refined look. Quick, precise, and gentle techniques for lasting smoothness.

  • Full Body Waxing
  • Lash Tinting
  • Brow Tinting
  • Gentle Techniques
Book This Service →

Gentleman's Services

Call for pricing 60 min

Tailored treatments for men's specific skin care needs — from deep cleansing and exfoliating scrubs to facial massage with shoulder and arm work. No frills, all results.

  • Gentleman's Facial
  • Deep Pore Cleansing
  • Exfoliating Scrub
  • Shoulder & Arm Massage
Book This Service →

Chiropractic

Call for pricing Varies

On-site chiropractic services complement your spa experience. Our practitioner attended Sherman College of Chiropractic — combining spinal wellness with total body relaxation.

  • Spinal Adjustments
  • Sherman College Trained
  • Pairs with Massage
  • Holistic Wellness
Book This Service →

Spa Enhancements

From $8 10–20 min

Add-on treatments to elevate any service. Eye treatments, aromatherapy, foot massage and more — schedule alone or enhance your facial, nail or body wrap session.

  • Aromatherapy — $10
  • Post-Massage Stretching — $10
  • Foot Massage — $10
  • Eye & Hand Treatments
Book This Service →

First Time?

How to Spa

Whether it's your first visit or your fiftieth, we make every experience effortless. Here's what to expect.

01

Book Your Visit

Call us at (864) 233-5352 or book online. All visits are by appointment only — we dedicate our full attention to every guest.

02

Arrive & Unwind

Arrive 10–15 minutes early to settle in. We'll greet you in our tranquil lobby at 105 Lavinia Ave in downtown Greenville.

03

Your Treatment

Your therapist will consult with you before beginning, customizing pressure, products and focus areas to your specific needs.

04

Extend the Bliss

Take your time after your session. Consider adding an enhancement — aromatherapy, stretching or a soothing foot massage.

Testimonials

What Our Guests Say

The Kara Ultimate Facial was worth every penny. My skin hasn't looked this good in years. The microderm and light therapy combination is incredible.

SM
Sarah M. Kara Ultimate Facial

As someone who's never been to a spa, the How to Spa guide put me at ease. The Gentleman's Facial was exactly what I needed — relaxing and zero awkwardness.

DR
David R. Gentleman's Facial

I booked the Wellness Package for my birthday and it was the best gift I've ever given myself. The massage therapist found tension I didn't know I had. Already rebooked.

JL
Jennifer L. Kara Wellness Package

Having massage and chiropractic under one roof is a game changer. I do both in one visit and leave feeling like a new person. Great downtown location too.

MT
Michael T. Massage + Chiropractic
Limited Availability

Your Escape Is
One Call Away

Appointments fill quickly — especially for our signature massage and facial packages. Don't wait to feel your best.

Our Team

In Expert Hands

Every member of our team is a licensed, certified professional dedicated to your wellness and comfort.

MT

Licensed Massage Therapists

Massage & Bodywork

Certified professionals specializing in deep-tissue, neuro-muscular, and integrative massage therapy techniques.

ES

Estheticians

Facials & Skin Care

Expert skin care specialists trained in microderm exfoliation, light therapy, and high-frequency treatments.

DC

Chiropractor

Chiropractic Services

Sherman College of Chiropractic graduate providing on-site spinal wellness and holistic body alignment.

NT

Nail Technicians

Pedicure & Nail Care

Skilled professionals delivering our signature hot stone pedicures and natural nail care treatments.

FAQ

Common
Questions

Everything you need to know before your visit. Can't find your answer? Give us a call.

Do I need to book an appointment?

Yes — all visits are by appointment only. This ensures we can dedicate our full attention to every guest without rush. Call us at (864) 233-5352 to schedule.

What should I expect on my first visit?

Arrive 10–15 minutes early to fill out a brief intake form. Your therapist will consult with you about your needs, preferences and any health considerations before beginning your treatment.

What is your cancellation policy?

We ask for at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations may be subject to a fee, as your appointment time was reserved exclusively for you.

Can I combine multiple treatments in one visit?

Absolutely. Our spa packages are designed for exactly this. You can also combine individual services — for example, massage followed by chiropractic, or a facial with spa enhancements.

Do you offer services for men?

Yes! Our Gentleman's Services include facials tailored for men's skin care needs, massage therapy, and chiropractic care. Many of our guests are men.

What are your hours?

We are open Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. We are closed on Saturday and Sunday. All visits are by appointment only.

Do you sell gift certificates?

Yes — gift certificates are available for any dollar amount or for specific services and packages. They make a perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because.

Get In Touch

Escape

All visits are by appointment only. Call us directly or fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
